nasb.text: The Lord God of hosts, The One who touches the land so that it melts, And all those who dwell in it mourn, And all of it rises up like the Nile And subsides like the Nile of Egypt;

esv.text: The Lord God of hosts, he who touches the earth and it melts, and all who dwell in it mourn, and all of it rises like the Nile, and sinks again, like the Nile of Egypt;

cnv.text: 萬軍之主耶和華摸地，地就融化， 住在地上的都要悲哀。 這地必像尼羅河高漲， 像埃及的大河退落。

ccb.text: 主——万军之耶和华触摸大地， 大地就消融，地上的人都要哀号； 大地如埃及的尼罗河涨起退落。
